ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Continued To Sep-02-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jun-28-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Nos. 6, 9, and 11. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken, and Plaintiff is ordered to respond further. The motion is granted as to Nos. 1, 4, 5, 7, and 8. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further. The motion is granted as to Nos. 10 and 14 as the objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The responses may be otherwise adequate. The motion is denied as to No. 12 as the work product objections is sustained. Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. (612/HEWLETT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-25-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
